flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The New School rose 26% between 2006 and 2009 ($28.6k → $36.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at The New School fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (55.8% → 46.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The New School rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.5k → $58.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The New School fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4k → 6.6k).
